rationale: The skill’s primary verbs are configuring, emulating, and deploying Firebase Hosting, so an agent will likely inspect Firebase config, package/build metadata, and static output directories, and may write firebase.json or .firebaserc when initializing or adjusting Hosting settings. The explicit command uses npx to run firebase-tools, which implies npm registry access plus Firebase/Google API calls during emulator setup or deployment. Deploy and preview workflows also imply Firebase Hosting domains such as firebaseapp.com and web.app.
